title: Oil prices jump after Iran attacks UAE as U.S. tries to open Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Brent crude futures rose nearly 6% to close at $114.44/bbl, WTI advanced 4%+ to $106.42/bbl. Prices briefly surged above $115 to fresh 4-year highs following Fujairah attack reports. Brent pared to ~$110 after US denied Iranian claims of striking a frigate. Both contracts up around 60% since the war started on Feb 28. UAE reported fire at Fujairah oil hub, one of first major infrastructure hits in weeks.
tag_reason: Brent hits fresh 4-year high above $114 on dual Hormuz showdown + UAE attack. Significant escalation from prior $108 level.
